info.name: MCQ Upload API
info.description: Upload MCQ questions from Excel to blob. Use form-data with key `file` and select an .xlsx with columns: Qn, Opt01, Opt02, Opt03, Opt04.

formdata.description: Excel file (.xlsx) with columns: Qn, Opt01, Opt02, Opt03, Opt04

request.description: Upload Excel with MCQ questions. Each row becomes a JSON blob. Response: status, uploaded count, failed count, blob_names, errors.
Reload MCQ questions from blob storage into cache.
